Mark Phase 99 complete in ROADMAP/STATE once UAT passes (or /gsd-plan-phase 99 --gaps if any fail)

blockers.description: billing_requests writes get permission-denied until the new rules block is deployed
blockers.workaround: firebase deploy --only firestore:rules --project dev (CLI active project is PROD — must use --project dev for UAT)

human_actions_pending.context: Phase 99 added the billing_requests rules block; without deploy the whole flow errors with permission-denied. CLI active project is PROD — use --project dev for UAT, then prod.
Zero-build SPA with no UI test harness; verification verdict was human_needed. All 6 success criteria need a browser pass.

decisions.decision: Executed inline sequentially on v3.3 (no subagents/worktrees)
decisions.rationale: gsd-sdk unavailable on this machine + 2 stale LOCKED agent worktrees (agent-a4222795..., agent-ab5541...) make the worktree/subagent path unsafe; matches Phase 98/91.3 precedent

decisions.decision: Own-requests listener scoped to currentProject.project_code via idempotent ensureBillingRequestsListener()
decisions.rationale: The URL projectCode param can be a Firestore doc id (Phase 78 D-06 clientless fallback) that differs from project_code, which is the field submit writes; plan explicitly offered this alternative

decisions.decision: Billing-type pills inlined as literal _selectBillingType('progress'|'completion'|'other') calls
decisions.rationale: A DRY pill(type) helper interpolated ${type} so the literal strings the acceptance criteria grep for were absent; inlining matches the contract and keeps intent grep-able

decisions.decision: Verification done inline (verdict human_needed); gsd-code-review skill skipped
decisions.rationale: Both depend on gsd-sdk (unavailable); did inline goal-backward verification + cross-plan contract check; code review is advisory and never blocks

next_action: Deploy rules to dev (firebase deploy --only firestore:rules --project dev), then run the 6 items in .planning/phases/99-billing-request-flow/99-HUMAN-UAT.md. If all pass, mark Phase 99 complete in ROADMAP + STATE; if any fail, /gsd-plan-phase 99 --gaps.
context_notes: Phase 99 (Billing Request Flow) is fully EXECUTED and committed on v3.3 — all 8 tasks across 3 plans (2 waves), 14 commits 0064849..e687432. No coding work remains. The pause point is purely 'awaiting human UAT + rules deploy'. Implementation is internally consistent: node --check passes on all 3 JS modules, firestore.rules balanced 61/61, cross-plan contract verified (notification enums defined in 99-01 consumed in 02/03; status:'pending' + project_code written by 02 match 03's query; requested_by_uid round-trips; 3-segment preselectKey built by 03 matches its own parser). The Finance banner listener follows the proven Phase-85 collectibles-listener lifecycle exactly. Other open loops (NOT this phase): merge v3.3 -> main then the pending 87.4 rules deploy (same firestore.rules file now also carries the billing_requests block); Phase 86.9 Plan 03 browser UAT.
